title: Exquisive™ May Series Basketball Knockout Tournament

With a massive digital reach of 150,000+ people, this event offers a huge platform for sponsors to get their brand in front of a massive, engaged audience. We’re looking for partners who want to tap into that influence and support the local sports scene. High Stakes, High visibility, join the EXQUISIVE team.

title: 3rd Workshop on Foreign Exchange Management Act
description:
Organized by the All India Chartered Accountants Society (AICAS), CFO World, and the Forum of India's Chartered Accountant Firms (FICAF), this premier 2-day workshop is an intensive refresher course on the Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA). The event focuses on an in-depth study of basic concepts, critical issues, practical applications, and recent regulatory developments related to foreign exchange in India.  
Key Event Details:
• Dates: Friday, 15th May 2026 & Saturday, 16th May 2026  
• Venue: India International Centre, Multi-Purpose Hall, New Delhi  
• Format: A 2-day intensive certificate course featuring multiple technical sessions led by eminent industry speakers and professionals.  
Target Audience:
This event brings together a highly concentrated demographic of key financial decision-makers, including:
• Chief Financial Officers (CFOs) and Finance Directors  
• Practicing Chartered Accountants (CAs) and AICAS Members  
• Finance Professionals and Corporate Consultants  
Key Topics Covered:
• Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) and Overseas Direct Investment (ODI) frameworks  
• International Debt Funding and External Commercial Borrowings (ECB)  
• Remittances, Liberalized Remittance Scheme (LRS), and NRI Investment Facilities  
• International Trade Settlement, Exports, and Imports  
• Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) obligations for professionals  
Why Sponsor?
Sponsoring the 3rd Workshop on FEMA provides an unparalleled opportunity to place your brand directly in front of India's top financial professionals and corporate advisors. It is an ideal platform for Authorized Dealer Banks, FinTech companies, global mobility consultants, and compliance software providers to network, demonstrate thought leadership, and generate high-quality B2B leads among professionals who actively manage global trade and foreign exchange transactions.

title: RANGAKARMI CRICKET LEAGUE 2026
description:
Rangakarmi Cricket League 2026 is a flagship, high-value sports and entertainment property conceptualized to unite the influence of Marathi entertainment with the mass appeal of cricket. Curated as an exclusive platform, the league features 6 premium franchise teams led by prominent actors, creators, and digital personalities, delivering a unique blend of sport, celebrity, and content.

Scheduled for 5–6 May 2026 at Bhavdevi Stadium, Mumbai, the league will host 9 professionally structured matches, including knockout stages and a grand finale, designed to maximize audience engagement and viewing retention.

This is not just an event, but a multi-platform brand experience powered by OTT streaming, social media amplification, and on-ground engagement. With a projected reach of 3L–5L+ impressions and extended visibility through celebrity networks exceeding 8L+ followers, the league ensures deep market penetration within a highly loyal Marathi audience segment.

For brands, Rangakarmi Cricket League 2026 offers premium association opportunities through:

Exclusive naming rights and category ownership
High-impact jersey and on-ground branding
Integrated OTT visibility and in-match placements
Curated digital storytelling and influencer amplification

Every association is strategically designed to deliver maximum visibility, strong brand recall, and measurable ROI, positioning partners not just as sponsors, but as integral contributors to a culturally relevant and scalable entertainment property.

Rangakarmi Cricket League is envisioned as a long-term, scalable IP, offering early partners the advantage of legacy association and category leadership in a rapidly growing regional entertainment ecosystem.

title: Wow Pune 2026
description:
Dear Sponsors,

I hope you’re doing well.

I’m reaching out to invite you to partner with us for WOW Pune 2026, one of Pune’s largest student developer conferences, scheduled on 25th April 2026 at Shantai Auditorium, D.Y. Patil College of Engineering, Akurdi. 

WOW Pune is a high-energy platform where technology, innovation, and community come together, bringing together 1000+ attendees, 25+ sessions, and 35+ industry leaders in previous editions. 
It is a student-led movement backed by multiple GDGoC chapters, focused on connecting future talent with brands and industry leaders. 

We believe you would be a perfect fit for this audience of young, ambitious, and trend-driven individuals.

Why Partner With WOW Pune?

By sponsoring WOW Pune 2026, you get:

-Direct brand visibility among 1000+ tech-savvy students & professionals
-On-ground brand presence (stall/experience zone) to showcase your products
-Sampling opportunities to drive trials and real-time feedback
-Social media promotions across our active tech community
-Association with innovation & youth culture
-Opportunity to position your brand as a lifestyle choice for the next generation

What Makes This Powerful for you?

This is not just sponsorship-it’s brand positioning at the right place, at the right time:

-Young audiences = high consumption + brand loyalty building stage
-Tech events = high engagement, long retention, premium perception
-Community-led platform = trust-driven exposure

We would love to explore a collaboration where your company becomes an official partner/experience partner for WOW Pune 2026.

Let’s connect for a quick discussion to explore how we can create a meaningful and high-impact association.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: LLL - Let's Learn Linux
description:
LLL: “Let’s Learn Linux” will be a 3-4 hour workshop hosted by the 2nd year members of 
Coding Club. It will aim to introduce students to the Linux kernel and it’s utilities. In this 
day and age, Linux has grown to be the most used Kernel worldwide. It’s derivative projects 
power everything from embedded projects to the biggest servers in usage. Knowledge of 
Unix-like systems is crucial to all-round development of an engineer today.
In LLL over the span of 4 hours, students will be guided through the fundamentals of Linux:
• Brief history of Linux,UNIX.
• Command Line Interface
• Linux Architecture (POSIX standard)
• Disk utilities
• File permissions, process permissions
• Networking commands
• Basic Linux utilities (Piping, Redirecting)
• Introduction to the Bourne Again Shell and system scripting

title: The Founders X Investors Pitch | Mumbai | 12th April | NMIMS
description:
The Founders X Investors Pitch | Mumbai | 12th April | NMIMS
Founders X Investors – Flagship Pitch Series
We are back with our flagship Founders X Investors Pitch Event, a high-impact platform designed to bridge ambitious founders with serious capital and strategic partners.
After a powerful previous edition that brought together promising startups and seasoned investors under one roof, we’re returning with an even sharper focus: curated connections, meaningful conversations, and real funding opportunities.

What is Founders X Investors?
Founders X Investors is a curated pitch forum where growth-stage and early-stage startups get the opportunity to present their ventures directly to angel investors, venture capitalists, family offices, and strategic partners.
The goal is simple:
Enable quality deal flow and build long-term founder–investor relationships.
We believe capital should meet clarity - and clarity begins with the right room.

What Makes This Different?
1. Curated Founders
Only selected startups get to pitch. Each venture is screened for scalability, clarity of vision, and market potential.
2. Verified Investors
We ensure the presence of active investors who are genuinely looking to deploy capital — not just attend events.
3. Structured Pitch Format
Founders present within a defined time format followed by focused Q&A, allowing investors to evaluate opportunity, traction, and team strength efficiently.
4. High-Value Networking
Beyond the stage, the event facilitates one-on-one interactions, private discussions, and meaningful introductions.

Who Should Attend?
For Founders:
Raising Pre-Seed, Seed, or Series A
Looking for strategic guidance along with capital
Ready with a clear deck, numbers, and growth roadmap
For Investors:
Angel investors
Venture capital funds
Syndicates
Family offices
Strategic corporates exploring innovation partnerships

Why We Do This
India’s startup ecosystem is expanding rapidly, but access to the right capital remains fragmented. Many founders struggle to get into the right rooms, and many investors struggle to find filtered, high-quality opportunities.
Founders X Investors is our effort to organize this gap.
We aim to:
Simplify fundraising access
Strengthen the early-stage ecosystem
Enable transparent, outcome-driven pitch forums
Foster long-term relationships beyond a single event

How to Apply
If you’re building something scalable and are actively raising,
send your pitch deck to:
varun.singh@thefounders.co.in ; mahek@thefounders.co.in
Subject Line: Founders X Investors – Pitch Submission
Our team will review all submissions and shortlist 10 companies to pitch at this edition.

title: One Life Bollywood Jam Night feat. Laqshay Kapoor
description:
One Life Bollywood Jam Night ft. Laqshay Kapoor is a vibrant live music experience bringing together nostalgia, popular Bollywood hits, and an electrifying jam-session vibe where the audience sings, sways, and becomes part of the celebration. Curated by One Life, the evening goes beyond a typical concert, creating an interactive musical atmosphere filled with soulful romantic melodies, energetic Punjabi beats, and unplugged acoustic moments performed live by the artist. The event will take place on 9th May at Mahalakshmi Lawns, Kharadi in Pune, promising a lively social night centered around music, community, and premium entertainment.

The event is expected to attract 800–1200 attendees, primarily urban millennials and Gen Z aged 21–40, including young professionals, entrepreneurs, corporate employees, and music enthusiasts who actively participate in lifestyle and nightlife experiences. With ticket prices starting at ₹1,200 for standing and going up to ₹21,000 for premium seating (entry-only, no inclusions), the event naturally attracts a premium, high-spending audience, making it an ideal platform for brands looking to connect with an affluent and experience-driven crowd.

Brands can leverage multiple sponsorship opportunities, including title sponsorship, category partnerships, experiential brand zones, product sampling, on-ground activations, and digital promotions across marketing campaigns and social media. This is a strong opportunity for brands to gain visibility and connect directly with a premium audience in a high-energy entertainment environment curated by One Life.

The audience will include founders, CXOs, investors, corporates, policymakers, technologists, and ecosystem leaders from across sectors.

The event will feature thought-provoking keynote sessions, panel discussions, and award recognitions, creating an environment that fosters growth, innovation, and strategic partnerships. title: CelestAI'26
description:
CELESTAI’26 is a premier international-level annual tech festival bringing together 2000+ Gen Z developers, innovators, and tech enthusiasts from leading institutions. Centered around AI, robotics, and edge technologies, the event serves as a high-impact platform for innovation, collaboration, and real-world problem solving.

The festival features flagship events such as RoboEdge (autonomous robotics challenge), EdgeIQ Challenge (AI-powered hackathon focused on edge intelligence), and SkyRift (advanced drone competition), alongside a diverse lineup of hands-on workshops, expert talks, technical competitions, and industry-led sessions. With a total prize pool exceeding ₹10+ lakhs, the event drives intense participation and high-quality project outcomes.

Blending technical excellence with Gen Z energy and creativity, CELESTAI’26 offers sponsors unparalleled access to a skilled, trend-aware, and highly influential youth audience, making it a powerful platform for brand visibility, product engagement, and future talent acquisition.

title: Echiesta 2k26
description:
Echiesta Fest 2026 is a two-day student festival organized by Echelon Institute of Technology, Faridabad, scheduled to take place on 26–27 March 2026. The fest aims to bring together students from across the region for a vibrant experience that blends entertainment, innovation, and technology.

The event will feature a live concert performance, creating an exciting and engaging atmosphere for students, along with a variety of technical competitions designed to encourage creativity, problem-solving, and practical engineering skills. These competitions include coding contests, robotics challenges, cybersecurity events, and project showcases.

With an expected footfall of 1200+ students over two days and a total prize pool of ₹75,000, Echiesta Fest 2026 will provide participants with opportunities to compete, collaborate, and showcase their talents while enjoying an energetic campus festival environment.

The fest also provides brands and organizations an opportunity to engage directly with a young and dynamic student audience, making it an ideal platform for sponsorship and brand visibility.

title: FriendsSquare People Excellency Awards
description:
FriendsSquare is back with the People Excellency Awards 2026—a first-of-its-kind platform in Asia dedicated to celebrating professionals and organisations transforming the future of work through impactful people practices.

This is a celebration of visionary HR leaders, culture champions, and organisations who have relentlessly worked to build stronger employee systems, foster healthier workplace cultures, and create environments where both people and businesses thrive. Grounded in organisational psychology, the platform recognises leaders driving real impact in engagement, well-being, inclusion, leadership development, and workplace culture.

Our People Excellency Awards aim to bring together senior HR decision-makers, business leaders, and forward-thinking organisations, creating a space for meaningful networking, collaboration, and conversations around building stronger, people-centric workplaces.

For sponsors, this is more than visibility, it is an opportunity to engage directly with influential HR leaders, build meaningful relationships, and connect with organisations actively investing in better people systems and workplace solutions.

Be part of a platform that celebrates those who prove that when organisations invest in their people, excellence follows.

title: Connaissance
description:
CONNAISSANCE, a national level technical symposium is an annual event held by Department of Mechanical Engineering, JNTUH-UCESTH since 2005. Within the span of 20 years, it has become highly successful in bringing industry and academia together, benefiting the students by exposing them to state-of-the-art practices in the vast expanse of Mechanical Engineering to a great extent. The central idea of the two-day meet is to bring forth innate talent, creativity, innovation, soft skills, organizing capabilities and leadership skills of the students to the maximum.

In the past, more than 3000 students within Telangana state and its neighboring states have participated in this symposium. In this edition of Connaissance we have decided to undertake various social events in like '2K AWARENESS RUN' dedicated to raising awareness about heart and brain stroke prevention and promoting heart health in young adults and environmental campaign for Solid waste Management.

title: NO FILTER CINEMA
description:
NoFilterCinema is a 7-day practical filmmaking workshop where young creators produce real brand-style content — ads, reels, and short films.

This is not a classroom course.
Participants receive live briefs and shoot at real locations, delivering finished content by the end of the workshop.

The goal is not only to teach filmmaking, but to connect local businesses with the city’s creative community.

That means the sponsor is not limited to logo placement —
the brand becomes part of the content itself.

What the sponsor receives

Brand location/product featured inside films and reels

30+ social media mentions and tags

Direct footfall from creators to the location

Posters, certificates, and on-site branding visibility

Exposure during the final screening event

Long-term connection with upcoming filmmakers and creators

In simple words

We are not asking for funding —
we are positioning your business inside the city’s creative culture through cinema.

title: OG HOLI FESTIVAL 2.0
description:
OG BIGGEST HOLI FESTIVAL OF PCMC AREA LOCATION IS BHOSARI PUNE 

11:00 AM | The Color Burst: The DJ ramps up the volume. A designated "First Toss" happens where everyone throws color at once to kick off the party.

12:30 PM | Peak Energy: The rain dance or sprinklers are turned on. This is usually when the "Dhol" (traditional drums) players enter to create a high-energy circle.

1:30 PM | Refuel: Open the food counters. The focus shifts from dancing to socializing and eating.

2:30 PM | Celebrity Dance . Gift hampers or "Best Dressed" awards are announced.

5:00 PM | Departure: Guests head out before the "post-Holi crash" sets in.

title: Promethean Model United Nations 2.0
description:
About Our team and ProMUN

Promethean Model United Nations began in June 2025 with a
group of 7 students from Coimbatore and Chennai. It quickly
evolved into the largest online MUN to ever grace both
circuits, with 110+ registrations.

We have now bought this same conference to an offline
essence, with the core team having hosted 50+ offline MUNs.
Hailing from both cities, we believe we can get significant
numbers.

Our Director General, Anindith, is currently in the 11th and
was part of the core team of the online ProMUN.

Our Chief Advisor, Keerthana, has helped organise 18+ MUNS
and is the founder of ProMUN.

Finally, our Conference Manager, Sahana Shriram, has hosted
three MUNs, one of which was her school's MUN (GTAMUN).

Our collective expertise will be vital and will ensure the
conference's resounding success.

Why Sponsor ProMUN?
Sponsoring ProMUN provides your brand with the
opportunity to:
1.Amplify brand recognition among a young, dynamic
audience of students, educators, and professionals.
2.Showcase your commitment to education and youth
development.

3.Engage directly with future leaders and decision-
makers.

4.Gain widespread visibility through digital promotions,
event materials, and on-site branding.
5.Given our background and network in two major cities,
we will be able to bring in talented delegates from
Coimbatore and Chennai.

title: 15th Empresario Startup Summit
description: Empresario Startup Summit 2026, the flagship national entrepreneurship event of the Entrepreneurship Development Institute of India (EDII), Ahmedabad, is a non-ticketed, government-linked academic summit designed to inspire and empower the next generation of innovators under the theme “The NextGen Youth Innovators.” The summit will bring together 1000+ students, young founders, aspiring entrepreneurs, family business successors, startup ecosystem participants, and institutional representatives from across the country for a high-impact mix of knowledge sessions, interactive formats, startup showcases, student engagements, and networking. Empresario offers sponsors a unique opportunity to engage meaningfully with a highly focused youth and innovation-driven audience, gain strong on-campus and digital visibility, and align their brand with entrepreneurship, education, and nation-building initiatives. Sponsorship associations are positioned as non-intrusive, value-driven partnerships, enabling long-term goodwill, ecosystem presence, and authentic brand engagement rather than sales-led promotion.

title: Rangover 2026 – Musical Holi Festival
description:
Rangover 2026 is a large-scale musical Holi celebration featuring live celebrity performances, top DJs, vibrant color play, food & beverage zones, and curated brand experience areas.

The event targets young professionals, families, students, and cultural enthusiasts from Mumbai and nearby regions. With GA, VIP, and VVIP zones, Rangover offers strong visibility and engagement opportunities for brands through on-ground activations, digital promotions, stage branding, influencer outreach, and category-exclusive sponsorships.

Sponsorship opportunities range from Title Sponsor to Partner Sponsors, including branding across event creatives, LED screens, entry arch, stage backdrop, stalls, social media campaigns, influencer shoutouts, and post-event reporting.

title: Thinkathon 9.0
description: Thinkathon 9.0 is the 9th edition of the flagship Idea Presentation Event, organized by the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science, in association with Google and supported by leading industry experts and industrialists. Thinkathon has evolved over the years into a prestigious platform that encourages students to showcase innovative ideas, disruptive technologies, and solution-oriented thinking. With each edition, the event has grown in scale, quality, and global participation
venue: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science

title: Musicland
description: India's biggest hip hop festival happening on 14th march 2026. at BKC mmrda (mumbai) our lineup includes artists like Badshah, seedhe maut, arpit bala and chaardiwari

title: Blaze’26 – National Level Sports Festival
description:
Blaze’26 is the national-level annual sports festival organized by the NMIMS ASMSOC Sports Club. The event brings together over 5,000+ sports enthusiasts from 50+ colleges across 5+ cities, featuring competitive tournaments in Football, Basketball, and Cricket.

Blaze has a strong legacy of hosting inter-college competitions with participation from institutions across Mumbai, Pune, Delhi, Bangalore, Kolkata, Haryana, and even international teams in previous editions. The festival offers brands extensive on-ground visibility, digital media exposure, and direct engagement with a young, sports-driven audience through sponsorships, activations, and promotional opportunities.

Target audience includes college students, young adults, sports enthusiasts, faculty members, and corporate partners, making Blaze’26 an ideal platform for brand awareness, lead generation, and experiential marketing.
venue: NMIMS ASMSOC Sports Ground / NMIMS Campus Sports Facilities

title: INFOTHON Hackathon 2K26
description:
INFOTHON Hackathon 2K26 is the first-ever hackathon organized by the Department of IT, DS & AI/ML at Thakur College of Science and Commerce, Mumbai. The event brings together 400–500 tech-focused students to work on real-world problem-solving through innovation, collaboration, and technology.

The hackathon aims to build a future-ready tech community by connecting students with industry and brands. It offers strong opportunities for sponsors to gain on-ground and digital visibility, engage directly with young talent, conduct market research, and build long-term association with a leading NAAC Grade ‘A’ institution.
venue: Thakur College of Science and Commerce

title: TEDx IIT Hyderabad
description:
TEDx IIT Hyderabad is an independently organized TEDx event hosted at the Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad. Since its inception in 2015, it has grown into one of the most anticipated annual intellectual events on campus.

The 2026 edition marks the 10th milestone year and aims to bring together thought leaders, innovators, creators, and changemakers from diverse domains to share powerful ideas worth spreading. The event includes a large-scale Theme Reveal Event with an expected footfall of 3,500+ attendees, followed by the Main TEDx Event with 600+ curated attendees.

The audience primarily consists of students, faculty, professionals, entrepreneurs, researchers, and industry leaders. Sponsors gain strong brand visibility through on-ground branding, digital promotions, social media mentions, YouTube talk uploads on the official TEDx platform, and direct engagement with a high-quality, intellectually driven audience.

Sponsorship opportunities include Gold, Silver, and Bronze tiers with benefits such as logo placement, stalls, event passes, LED screen visibility, social media promotions, and post-event digital presence.
venue: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)

title: MPL Season 2
description: MPL Season 2 is a community cricket tournament based in Mulund, designed to bring together local players, families, and cricket lovers through a high-energy auction-based format. After the successful completion of MPL Season 1 with 48 matches and 17,000+ digital views, MPL Session 2 aims to deliver bigger engagement, stronger community participation, and high brand visibility for sponsors through matchday branding, live streaming promotions, and on-ground activations. Sponsorship opportunities include Auction Sponsor, Toss Sponsor, Live Streaming Sponsor, Match Sponsorship, Turf Sponsor, Medical Sponsor, and Food & Beverage Co-Sponsor.

title: Mister Meghalaya, Mrs Meghalaya & Mr Teen Meghalaya 2026
description:
Mister Meghalaya, Mrs Meghalaya & Mr Teen Meghalaya 2026 is a premium state-level pageant celebrating confidence, personality, leadership, and talent across three categories: Mister, Mrs, and Mr Teen. The event is designed to spotlight aspirational individuals who represent Meghalaya’s pride, culture, and modern identity.

With an expected audience of 300+ attendees, this platform brings together youth, families, professionals, influencers, and media, creating strong on-ground engagement and digital visibility for partner brands.
The event offers excellent branding and promotional opportunities through stage presence, digital campaigns, press coverage, and sponsor integration during the show.

Why Brands Should Partner
•	Direct engagement with youth, families, professionals & influencers
•	Strong on-ground and digital brand visibility
•	Association with leadership, excellence, and aspiration
•	Extensive media, social media & press coverage
•	Long-term collaboration opportunities

title: Miss Universe Meghalaya 2026 & Miss Teen Meghalaya 2026
description:
Miss Universe Meghalaya 2026 & Miss Teen Meghalaya 2026 are official, nationally governed state pageants conducted under the framework of the Miss Universe India Organisation. The event is designed to identify, groom, and present Meghalaya’s most inspiring women and teens as cultural ambassadors who will represent the state on national platforms.

This pageant goes beyond fashion and competition. It focuses on confidence, leadership, communication, personality development, and cultural pride, creating ambassadors who promote Meghalaya’s tourism, traditions, and values across India and beyond.

The event is professionally coordinated at the state level by a dedicated team led by Mr. Brian N. Wallang (State Director) and Mr. Shrawan Pradhan (State Pageant Coordinator), with Wanda Nongbri and Liam (Event Managers) ensuring transparency, inclusivity, and adherence to national standards.

To ensure fair and equal participation across Meghalaya, auditions and selection activities will cover all three major regions:
•	Khasi Hills
•	Jaintia Hills
•	Garo Hills
The finale will feature key rounds including stage introductions, grooming showcases, interactive segments, and a grand crowning ceremony, attracting strong public engagement, media interest, and social visibility.
National Platforms Represented
•	Miss Universe India
•	Miss Teen India

Why Sponsors Should Partner
Sponsors get an excellent opportunity to connect with a large youth and family audience through:
•	On-ground branding and visibility
•	Digital promotions and social media reach
•	Stage and backdrop branding
•	Host mentions and brand integrations
•	Product showcasing, sampling, and gifting opportunities

This event is a premium platform for brands in beauty, fashion, grooming, wellness, lifestyle, FMCG, education, hospitality, and local businesses looking for high-impact visibility in Meghalaya.

title: IDEATHON 6.0
description:
The Ideathon, organized by Team SRM Hackathon, is a platform for
fostering innovation and collaboration 
challenges. Participants work in teams
to address real-world 
to transform ideas into
actionable solutions, guided by expert mentorship and feedback from
industry professionals, unlocking new opportunities along the way.
What makes the event truly stand out is the sense of community and
inspiration it cultivates . The collaborative atmosphere encourages
participants to push the boundaries of creativity while building
meaningful connections . With its focus on fresh thinking and impactful
solutions, the Ideathon continues to be a hub for groundbreaking ideas
and exciting opportunities .
venue: SRM INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY

title: Spice Master of Maharashtra
description:
Spice Master of Maharashtra is a flavourful cooking competition celebrating the rich culinary heritage of Maharashtra. Hosted by Chav Maharashtrachi – The Taste of Maharashtra, this event brings together passionate home chefs, food enthusiasts, and culinary professionals to showcase their skills using Chav Maharashtrachi’s signature masalas.

The competition will have multiple rounds, starting with an online recipe video submission, followed by a high-energy live finale where shortlisted participants will present their dishes in front of a live audience and celebrity judges. Winners will be crowned “Spice Master of Maharashtra” and receive exciting prizes.

Target Audience
- Home chefs & cooking enthusiasts
- Food lovers & families
- Culinary influencers & content creators
- Local media & food community

Sponsorship Opportunities
Sponsors will get strong brand visibility and direct engagement through:
- On-ground branding at the live finale
- Social media promotions across Instagram, Facebook & YouTube
- Live streaming & event highlights content
- Giveaways and product showcasing
- Press releases & media coverage (newspapers, magazines, blogs)
- Exclusive interactions with judges, chefs & influencers
